dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world ended. Again. And again. A cycle of despair, hope, and inevitable collapse.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: How many times has it been? A thousand? Ten thousand? The faces of the 'Awakeners' who came before me blur into a single, tragic memory.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: Each time, the world 'falls'. Each time, new 'Awakeners' rise, clutching at the illusion of purpose. They climb the Tower, believing they can change something.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: They all fail. Every single one. Their hopes, their sacrifices... all swallowed by the void. Except me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He was the last. The last Awakener to reach the summit of the Great Tower, a monument to endless failure.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: Is this it? Is this all there is to your grand design?

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: The 'Gods' call it a cycle. A test. A game. They offer power, knowledge, a chance to 'save' the world. But what world is there left to save when the very foundation is rotten?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WIND WHISTLES, CARRYING ECHOES OF DISTANT SCREAMS

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: I've seen it all. The initial spark of courage, the slow erosion into despair, the final, pathetic surrender. I've watched entire civilizations crumble, reduced to data points in your 'System'.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Below him, the fragmented remnants of countless worlds swirled like dust motes in a cosmic current.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: They say I 'see' things others don't. A 'defect' in my awakening, a 'bug' in their perfect simulation.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: Maybe it's just that I'm tired of the lies. Tired of the endless charade.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SYSTEM CHIME, LOUD AND IMPERSONAL

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Last Awakener. You have successfully reached the 100th Floor of the Great Tower.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [As the sole survivor of the current 'Fall', you are granted the ultimate choice, as dictated by the Universal Laws of Existence.]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: The ultimate choice. What a predictable, condescending joke.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Option 1: Reset the world. Begin a new cycle, with your memories intact.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Option 2: Ascend to the realm of the Gods. Become a 'God' yourself.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Option 3: Accept the 'End'. Fade into oblivion.]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: None of those. Not a single one.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Please choose one of the provided options. Failure to comply will result in System termination.]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: I said, *none* of them. Are your algorithms so limited?

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: They don't understand. This isn't about choosing an ending from their list. It's about finding a *true* ending.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ENERGY CRACKLES, THE AIR THICKENS WITH UNSEEN POWER

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: They talk about cycles, systems, order. A perfect, self-sustaining prison.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: But what if the order itself is the problem? What if the 'System' is the true enemy?

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: I'm not resetting anything. I'm not becoming one of your glorified jailers. And I'm certainly not fading away.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: I'm going to destroy this world. All of it. Every single layer, every single rule, every single 'God'.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Warning! This action is not permitted. Attempting to disrupt the fundamental cycle will result in severe, irreversible consequences for all reality.]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: Consequences? I've lived through countless 'consequences'. What more can they do to me? What can they threaten when I've already lost everything?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS, SLOW, DELIBERATE, RESONATING WITH AN UNNATURAL WEIGHT

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: You talk about 'Falls' and 'Awakeners'. You talk about 'Gods' and 'Systems'.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: But all I see is a prison. A meticulously crafted cage designed to keep us trapped.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: And I'm going to break it. I'm going to tear down your Tower, your System, your very concept of 'reality'.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WORLD SHAKES VIOLENTLY, CRACKS APPEAR IN THE SKY

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Critical Error! Unauthorized action detected! Reality integrity compromised! Initiating absolute countermeasures! Threat level: EXISTENCE-ENDING!]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: Countermeasures? Against what? Against the simple truth that this entire construct is a lie?

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: They call me a monster. A destroyer.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: But maybe, true creation can only begin after absolute destruction.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: REALITY TEARS APART WITH A SCREAMING RUPTURE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a single, defiant step, Jaehwan moved. Not towards an option, but *against* the very fabric of the world, against the 'System' itself. His will, an unyielding blade.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: This isn't an ending. This is a beginning. A true beginning.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: EXPLOSION OF RAW ENERGY, REALITY SHATTERS

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [SYSTEM OVERLOAD! REALITY INTEGRITY COMPROMISED BEYOND REPAIR! ABORT! ABORT! ALL GODS, RETREAT!]

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: The others, they accepted their roles. They played the game.

dialogue.speaker: JAEHWAN
dialogue.line: I'm done playing. The game is over.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And so, the Last Awakener, who had seen the world fall countless times, decided to make it fall one last, definitive time. On his own terms. Not to reset, but to truly end.

summary: Jaehwan, the Last Awakener, stands atop the Great Tower after countless 'Falls'. Offered three choices by the System to continue the cycle, he defiantly rejects them all, declaring his intent to destroy the entire world and the System itself to find a true end.
